# Release v1.5.0

Design pattern refactor introducing a game variant system, strategy-based win detection, and safer public APIs.

---

## Changelog

## [1.5.0] - 2026-06-24

### Added

- Game variant system with predefined variants selected via the `variant` option (`GameVariant.CLASSIC_3X3`)
- Strategy pattern for game variants: `resolveGameStrategy` plus the `classic3x3` strategy implementation
- `PlayerMoveStatus` and `BackToMoveStatus` return values for `savePlayerMove` and `backToMove`
- `Object.freeze` on board snapshots to prevent external mutations
- JSDoc comments across core classes and public APIs
- Test coverage for game strategy resolution, `Board`, constants, types, and public API

### Changed

- `boardSize` option deprecated; arbitrary board sizes are no longer supported in favor of predefined `variant` values
- Type files moved to `src/game/types/` and renamed to the `.types.ts` suffix for consistency
- `GameOptions` type moved to `src/game/types/Game.types.ts`
- `tsup` build split into separate CJS and ESM outputs
- Project structure reorganized: `Board.ts` and `Game.ts` moved under `src/game/`
- Winning combinations moved to strategy-specific constants

### Removed

- `AUDIT.md` (replaced by inline JSDoc documentation)

[1.5.0]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core/compare/v1.4.4...v1.5.0
